text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a day like any other. I hear a commotion from
the academy fields and go to take a look.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Directooor! Don't tell me you used your pocket money again?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What are you planning to do with a farm this
size?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Cease! Desist! Wait, Tazuna! I'll have you know
there's a very good explanation!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I would certainly like to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Benevolence! You see, I thought we might need
to liven up the venue during the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
When you think of racecourses, what springs to
mind? That's right, the food! A hearty meal and a
thrilling race go hand in hand!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But not just any food will do. It has to be
impactful! Memorable! Get the people talking!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thusly! I have decided that we will set up our own
fields to grow Tracen-brand carrots!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All right... I see where you're coming from,
Director. Your heart is always in the right place.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But your HEAD, on the other hand... What were you THINKING?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Wah! Tazuna! Mercy! Have mercy!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ahem. Dare I ask whether you saw that?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies... We've shown you a most shameful
display.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Segue! You've been working hard!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Still... Hmmm. It seems you still have a little
further to go. Fans don't come easily, do they?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However! We applaud your efforts! Keep
participating in races and gaining fans!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! You're getting solid results, and your
fan base is growing rapidly!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Aim for even greater success to secure your place
in the URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Astounding! You're doing better than I ever
imagined! Your popularity is astronomical!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your trainee's condition certainly looks favorable
for a spot in the URA Finale. All I can say is to
keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Speaking of working hard...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hello there, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Hello...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer Kiryuin! And Meek too! What a
coincidence! I was just about to mention you two!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! Your growth has been no less
impressive than Trainer
<username>'s!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much, Director.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Trainer
<username>... we have no
more doubts.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We've resolved to share our burdens,
walk side by side, and aim for the top together.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I'll win... That'll prove... that I have the best
trainer in the world.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And I'll work harder than ever. I want to see Meek
win the highest honor...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Conquering the URA Finale... That's our shared
goal.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Hip, hip, hooray.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Hip, hip! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh? So this is where you've all been!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Good afternoon, everyone. May I have a little of
your time?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Miss Otonashi! Of course! What can we do for
you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Well, you see... there's something I want
to show you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a sly smile, Reporter Otonashi shows us an
article about the URA Finale that has been
posted online...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...before scrolling down to the comments section
to reveal a wall of posts from expectant fans!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Oooohhh! My, my, my!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all of your efforts, the URA Finale is
attracting a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Excellent! Everything's coming together!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Conviction! We're going to make the URA Finale
a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale... An event where all Umamusume
can shine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to contain my excitement as it gets
closer.
